title: helianthemum hirtum subsp. bethuricum
intro: Helianthemum hirtum subsp. bethuricum is a sub-species of the Helianthemum hirtum plant, commonly known as a type of rockrose. This perennial plant is native to certain regions and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum hirtum subsp. bethuricum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health concerns.
